title: [Origin Realms] Accurate ToolSkins
description: Changes 32x Toolskins to a more classic 16x appearance
body:
THIS RESOURCEPACK NEEDS [ServerPackUnlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker)

The 2024 summer event introduced new tool skins bigger(32x) than the usual ones(16x)
so i designed this pack is for all the people who prefer the regular sized tools

The new tool sprites are taken from the original token sprites themselves, although some minor corrections are made to them to make them fit the sprite size better (the token textures are also tweaked to distinguish them better from the actual tools)

**I will update this pack every time new tool skins of bigger size(32x) are added**

---

**Corbel sword skin** (most recent tool skin)
